reasons: Angela can attach to Helcurt during his dive window, giving him shield and movement support while he commits to a backline pickoff.
Helcurt benefits from Angela's protection because his burst plan often requires entering close range and surviving long enough to finish or escape.

proof.summary: Helcurt creates the dive and pickoff angle, while Angela strengthens the commit with shield and movement support.
worksBestWhen: Angela saves Heartguard for Helcurt's real dive.
Helcurt enters after the target has limited peel nearby.
failureCases: Angela attaches too early and Helcurt does not commit.
Helcurt dives into layered hard control without follow-up.

reasons: Kaja can isolate one target and give Helcurt a clear burst target instead of forcing Helcurt to search blindly for an opening.
Helcurt can follow Kaja's catch with fast damage during the target's limited response window.

proof.summary: Kaja creates the single-target control window, while Helcurt follows with burst before the target can reposition or receive peel.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches a priority target instead of a frontline tank.
Helcurt is close enough to follow immediately.
failureCases: Helcurt is late and the enemy team peels the target.

reasons: Mathilda can give Helcurt an extra mobility route and shield support before or after he commits.
Helcurt can convert Mathilda's movement support into a stronger backline entry or safer reset path.

proof.summary: Mathilda supports Helcurt's dive path with mobility and shielding, helping him enter or leave after a pickoff attempt.
worksBestWhen: Mathilda positions near Helcurt's intended dive path.
Helcurt uses the mobility support to reach a priority target instead of overchasing.
failureCases: Mathilda is too far away to provide the route.
Helcurt dives after Mathilda's support skills are already spent.

reasons: Selena can provide trap vision and long-range stun setup before Helcurt commits.
Helcurt can use Selena's vision and control information to choose a safer burst angle.

proof.summary: Selena scouts and threatens a stun, while Helcurt uses that information to commit on a safer isolated target.
worksBestWhen: Selena controls bushes or jungle entrances before Helcurt enters.
Helcurt commits only after Selena confirms target position.
failureCases: Selena misses the setup and Helcurt dives blind.
The enemy groups tightly and denies single-target isolation.

reasons: Floryn can support Helcurt from distance when he dives away from normal support range.
Helcurt benefits from Floryn's global sustain because his pickoff pattern often needs survival after the first commit.

proof.summary: Helcurt creates a dive or pickoff window, while Floryn can support him from distance with healing during or after the commit.
worksBestWhen: Helcurt commits after building a real pickoff angle.
Floryn saves her key healing for Helcurt's real fight window.
failureCases: Helcurt is bursted before healing can matter.
Floryn's key healing is unavailable during Helcurt's commit.
